content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

February 4, 2002

Elyssa Wong
Research and Library Services Division
Legislative Council Secretariat
5/F, Citibank Tower
3 Garden Road, Central
Hong Kong, China

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. G-02-020

Dear Ms. Wong:

This letter is in response to your request for information regarding the revolving door provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).¹

You request information as to whether there are restrictions for former members of government, including former Governors, from accepting appointments to public office which are compensated positions. No such prohibition exists in the Political Reform Act.

For your perusal and guidance, please find enclosed a fact pamphlet regarding post-governmental employment laws, and corresponding government and regulation codes. If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Marie Fain
Legal Analyst, Legal Division

:mf
Enclosures
I:\AdviceLtrs\G-02-020

¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
